observations: YAML frontmatter only, no body content
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp
The target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-a27ba18c
The attachment id prefix is att-
standouts: Target is a board:// URI rather than a file path or URL
File is purely metadata with no explanatory content
conventions: Identifier uses a short prefixed token (att-)
External entity referenced by URI scheme
concerns: No body or description explaining what the attachment represents
Meaning depends entirely on the referenced board item
notes: A bare metadata stub that records a board item attachment to the dragnet-development channel.
